published_prior_art.cite: Russell2021/OberReynolds2023: OT/LP bounds for joint-potential-outcome functionals already make relaxation-validity routine

repo_prior_art.cite: doc/API.md §3.1 has Manski selected-cell mean bounds only; pid_dose_response_iv/v1 is adjacent but continuous-dose rank-slope, not finite DTE cycle-pasting

published_prior_art.cite: GaoGeQian2024: causal partial identification via multi-marginal OT is closer than listed; classical marginal-compatibility results also overlap with the cycle/pasting layer
FirpoRidder2019: finite-vector Makarov nonuniformity is close but does not state the proposed shared-restriction open-class cycle obstruction

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 1
novelty_flags.one_line: The closest published-axis survey omits Gao, Ge and Qian (2024), which casts causal partial identification with multiple potential outcomes as exact multi-marginal OT.

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 2
novelty_flags.one_line: The §8 comparison cites FirpoRidder2019 by bibkey only; a flagship nonsharpness claim needs a section/equation/page anchor for the finite-vector Makarov gap.

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 2
novelty_flags.one_line: The handoff promises FirpoRidder2019 is matched by a non-representability result, but the §8 headline is only an open nonsharpness class and is not phrased as a strict frontier against Firpo-Ridder.

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 2
novelty_flags.one_line: tier=field below novelty_target=flagship; the generic open-class claim gives only dimensions C=3, M=N=2, K=2, not a concrete non-corner finite law with named atoms and imbalance.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 1
soundness_flags.one_line: The cycle imbalance B_P(q) is not well-defined for row/column envelopes and rank-tube inequalities: the proposal names RHS sums but does not specify active facets, slack variables, or equality conversion.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 1
soundness_flags.one_line: The full-data feasible set is asserted to differ from local cell tables, but the setup does not precisely define which latent variables are shared across cells rather than conditionally rebuilt cell-by-cell.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Replace the informal hypergraph certificate by an explicit incidence matrix with equality-expanded slack variables for every envelope/tube inequality, then define B_P(q) on that matrix.
Add a concrete C=3, M=N=2, K=2 witness with cell weights, atoms, local tables, shared rank equations, and a computed nonzero cycle imbalance.
Add Gao-Ge-Qian 2024 and a classical marginal-compatibility citation such as Kellerer/Vorob'ev to Related work, and state exactly why the proposed DTE cycle certificate is not subsumed.
Rewrite Conjecture 2 as an explicit strict frontier against the location-anchored Firpo-Ridder finite-vector result, or downgrade Firpo-Ridder to background motivation.

recommended_next_step: Revise the certificate definition and add a nondegenerate finite witness; without those, this remains a field-tier OT/marginal-compatibility extension rather than a flagship kernel.
